function.name: parse_cops_test
function.signature: static int parse_cops_test(const char* string, int position, at_command_t* at_command)

bug.description: use-after-free vulnerability where freed memory is subsequently accessed

prompt:
There is a use-after-free vulnerability where freed memory is subsequently accessed downstream of function parse_cops_test in the openair3/NAS/UE subsystem.
The function is located at openair3/NAS/UE/API/USER/at_command.c:1306.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
